g.text: Why Tag Reuse is Catastrophic -- one byte sequence, two interpretations
The same message in Kafka is read by schema v1 as $50 USD. Six months later, schema v2 reuses the same tag for a different field. Replay corrupts everything downstream.
sit in Kafka with v1 bytes.
Reviewer missed: tag 3 used to be price_cents.
Replay job reads v1 bytes through v2 schema:
The SAME 3 bytes (18 88 27) interpreted by two schemas:
1M events x 6 months of finance impact
The wire format has no way to know which schema produced the bytes. Tag numbers are the only contract -- reuse one and old messages decode as the new type, silently.
